examples: I'll buy you a delicatessen in stainless steel!
Delicatessen usually require little preparation for serving.
Our main customers are from gourmet and delicatessen establishments.

We turned into recluses and had all our food delivered from Greenblatt's Delicatessen on Sunset Boulevard.
